headline: More than a decade later, the team behind N++ is back with a multiplayer sequel
summary: Metanet, creators of the 2D platformer N++, announce a multiplayer sequel. N++ was released in 2015, building on a decade of previous "N" titles. Cofounder Raigan Burns's "famous last words" about not taking another 10 years are put to the test.

headline: Grand Theft Auto VI is warping the video game release calendar
summary: GTA VI's upcoming release is significantly impacting the video game release schedule. Many developers are avoiding November, the rumored launch month, at Summer Game Fest. The highly anticipated title's presence is felt even without official appearances.

headline: Final Fantasy VII’s remake trilogy will conclude with Revelation
summary: Square Enix announced "Final Fantasy VII Revelation," the final game in the remake trilogy. It will launch simultaneously on PC, PS5, Xbox Series X/S, and Switch 2 in spring 2027. Footage was showcased at Summer Game Fest Live.

headline: Control Resonant is a sequel — and also a starting point
summary: "Control Resonant" is chronologically a sequel to 2019's "Control." Developer Remedy states the games are not directly connected and can be played in any order. Creative director Mikael Kasurinen describes them as two sides of the same coin.

headline: Fortnite Live Event Stuns Fans as The Rock's Fate Is Revealed and Ben Starr's Character Is Unmasked in Shock Twist
summary: Fortnite concluded a dramatic live event, pushing its storyline forward. The event revealed the fate of The Rock's character. Ben Starr's character was unmasked in a shocking twist.

headline: God of War Laufey Director 'Understands' Skepticism Following Reveal, but Hopes Fans Give It a Chance
summary: Ariel Lawrence, director of "God of War Laufey," addressed fan skepticism after its reveal. Lawrence expressed understanding but hopes fans will give the new game a chance. The director's comments follow the initial reception to the game's announcement.

headline: 007 First Light Reveals Road Map; Story DLC, New Game+, and More Coming Soon
summary: "007 First Light" announced its year-one road map for post-launch content. Upcoming features include story DLC and New Game+. The game is set to receive significant ongoing support.

headline: Telltale CEO Explains Why The Wolf Among Us 2 Has Taken So Long, And What Happened With That Split With Dispatch Maker Ad Hoc
summary: Telltale Games CEO Jamie Ottilie explained delays for "The Wolf Among Us 2." Ottilie discussed the restart of development and the split with AdHoc. The interview also touched on the possibility of a "Wolf Among Us 3."

headline: Downing Street hits out at 'people seeking to stir division' after Vance's Nowak post
summary: Downing Street criticized those "seeking to stir division." The comments followed a post by the US vice-president on Henry Nowak's death. The vice-president's X post referred to "righteous anger."

headline: US and Iran exchange strikes in Gulf in latest test of ceasefire
summary: The US and Iran exchanged strikes in the Gulf, testing a ceasefire. The US military targeted Iranian drones and radar sites. Tehran retaliated by striking US bases in Kuwait and Bahrain.

headline: Buffy and Ted Lasso star Anthony Head dies at 72
summary: British actor Anthony Head passed away at 72. Known for roles in "Buffy," "Ted Lasso," "Merlin," and "Little Britain." His death was due to complications from pneumonia.

headline: Putin says there is 'no point' meeting Zelensky over ending Ukraine war
summary: Russian President Putin rejected a meeting with Ukrainian counterpart Zelensky. Zelensky had sent an open letter calling for face-to-face peace talks. Putin stated there was "no point" in such a meeting regarding the Ukraine war.
